---
title: "HengHsieh Chang"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Jessica19940828
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jessicachang
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:jessica830828@gmail.com

---

Hi, I'm HengHsieh Chang 👋  
A marketing professional with over six years of experience driving market expansion and revenue growth. Currently, I am expanding my analytical capabilities as a **Master of Business Analytics student at Monash University**.

Previously, as a Brand Manager at Taiwan's largest crowdfunding platform, I led a team to achieve industry-leading sales records and a 300% increase in annual revenue growth for our clients[cite: 19]. My expertise lies in developing bespoke marketing plans that leverage data analytics, SEO/SEM, and compelling copywriting to maximize ROI and foster long-term client loyalty.

I am passionate about using data to uncover insights and tell powerful stories. I am proficient in both Mandarin (Native) and English (Fluent). I am eager to apply my unique blend of marketing strategy and advanced analytics to solve complex business challenges.


## Education
Monash University | Melbourne, Australia  
Master's in Business Analytics | 2024 - Present  

Taipei Medical University | Taipei, Taiwan  
Bachelor of Science | 2012 - 2016  

National Taipei University | Taipei, Taiwan  
Certificate in Law | 2013 - 2017  

## Experience
Ontoo Company Limited by Shares | Brand Manager | 2021 - 2025  
EMAG Technology Co., Ltd. | Digital Marketer | 2019 - 2021  
Taiwan Rakuten Ichiba | Social Media Specialist | 2016 - 2018
